memories.content: Pre-commit hooks: ruff, ruff-format, mypy. TYPE_CHECKING imports for forward refs. Dev: npm run dev:all. Venv: backend/venv/. DB: postgresql://postgres:postgres123@localhost:5432/dashboard_interface_data.

CellMappingParser loads ~1,169 mappings from Underwriting_Dashboard_Cell_References.xlsx. Supplemental mappings in common.py override incorrect sheet names and add missing fields. Key correction: LEVERED/UNLEVERED returns (E39-E44) are on 'Returns Metrics (Summary)' NOT 'Assumptions (Summary)' as the reference file says. LP_RETURNS (E102-E103) correctly on 'Returns Metrics (Summary)'. T3_RETURN_ON_COST (G27, 'Assumptions (Summary)') added as supplemental. All 6 return fields + T3 cap rate now in needed_fields and enrichment code in deals.py.

Activity feed: backend returns {items}, frontend maps to {activities} with field translation. API client: src/lib/api/client.ts. Auth: JWT via authStore.ts, backend require_analyst/require_manager guards.

v5 (2026-03-04): Renamed to Total Loss Factor (T12). Removed UW Model button. Full-width stage header. Compare Deals aesthetic overhaul (removed Card/transparent bg, explicit bg-white + shadow-card, full-width centered deal name headers). Fixed leveredIrr/leveredMoic Zod transform (was ?? 0, now ?? undefined for 'N/A'). ComparisonCharts uses real UW metrics (Cap Rate, NOI Margin, returns). LP IRR/MOIC row in ComparisonTable. Returns metrics corrected: supplemental mapping sheet overrides for LEVERED/UNLEVERED (Returns Metrics Summary, not Assumptions Summary), enrichment code for all 6 return fields. shadcn CSS variables added to index.css :root + tailwind.config.js color mappings.

shadcn UI components (Card, Dialog, Table, Button) use CSS variable classes (bg-background, bg-card, text-muted-foreground, bg-muted). Added CSS variables to index.css :root and color mappings to tailwind.config.js. Without these, all shadcn components render transparent. Key vars: --background (white), --card (white), --muted (neutral-50), --muted-foreground (neutral-500), --border (neutral-200).

test_parallel_fingerprint_fixtures times out (pre-existing). Vite chunks: exceljs 937KB, vendor-charts 455KB. Redis not configured locally. Zod: .nullable().optional() for DB fields — always use ?? undefined (not ?? 0) to get 'N/A' display.
